name: Linton, Overseal and Lullington

locations.address:
Derby South Section,
Civic Way,
Swadlincote,
Derby,

description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Coton in the Elms, Overseal, Netherseal, Linton, Lullington, Rosliston & Castle Gresley. It belongs to the South Derbyshire Local Policing Unit.

The area lies within the National Forest and consists of fifteen small rural villages. Seven of the villages have their own parish council and or neighbourhood watch. The area is bordered by Staffordshire to the west and south/west and Leicestershire to the east and south /east.
